parts.label: 1(a)(iii)

parts.label: 1(a)(iv)

parts.label: 1(b)(i)
parts.guidance: B1 for 7x/2 oe

parts.label: 1(b)(ii)
parts.guidance: FT their (b)(i); B1 for x + 12; B1 for their 7x/2 - 26

parts.label: 1(b)(iii)
parts.guidance: M1dep for their (7x/2 - 26) = 3 x their (x + 12) oe; M2dep for isolating x terms, dep on eqn with term in x and constant on each side and with a bracket or fraction; or M1dep for correctly removing brackets or dealing with fractions, dep on eqn with term in x and constant on each side and with a bracket or fraction

parts.label: 2(a)(i)
parts.guidance: B1 for 28

parts.label: 2(a)(ii)

parts.label: 2(a)(iii)
parts.guidance: B1 for each value

parts.label: 2(b)(i)
parts.guidance: M1 accept the sum of individual areas if done in smaller parts; A1 with intermediate step shown and brackets removed with no errors or omissions

parts.label: 2(b)(ii)
parts.guidance: B1 for x = 6 identified from graph or using calculus; M1 for 36 x their 6 - 2 x (their 6)^2

parts.label: 3(a)(i)
parts.guidance: M1 for mid-points soi (90, 125, 175, 250, 350); M1 for use of sum(fm) with m in correct interval including both boundaries; M1 for (dep on 2nd M1) for sum(fm) / 200; A1 for 211.275

parts.label: 3(a)(ii)
parts.guidance: M1 for 32 x 350 - 32 x 330 oe or better, or the reverse of this; B1 for 3.2 or -3.2 final answer

parts.label: 3(a)(iii)
parts.guidance: B2 for two correct heights; or B1 for one correct height or 3 correct frequency densities; or M1 for scale factor of 5 or 0.2

parts.label: 3(b)
parts.guidance: B1 for 4/25 oe

parts.label: 3(c)(ii)
parts.guidance: M2 for [2x] 84/200 x 7/199 oe; or B1 for 84/200 and 7/199 or 84/199 and 7/200 oe; If 0 scored, SC1 for answer 147/5000 oe

parts.guidance: B1 for each

parts.label: 4(a)(ii)
parts.guidance: B1 for each

parts.label: 4(a)(iii)
parts.guidance: B1 for each

parts.label: 4(b)
parts.guidance: B1 for the line y = x + 8 drawn soi long enough to be fit for purpose; or correct size and orientation but wrong position

parts.label: 5(a)(i)
parts.guidance: B1 for 14/18 oe

parts.label: 5(a)(ii)
parts.guidance: M3 for 1/2(10 + 24)18 + 22 x 24 - 134 = 40v oe; or M2 for 1/2(10 + 24)18 + 22 x 24 oe; or B2 for [distance covered by bus =] 700; or M1 for correct method for any partial area for the car; or for 40v

parts.label: 5(b)
parts.guidance: M1 for figs162[4] / their 10 min 30 sec oe; M1 for correct conversion to km/h, e.g. x 60/1000

parts.label: 6(b)
parts.guidance: B1 for (a - 3)(a + 3)

parts.label: 6(c)

parts.label: 6(d)
parts.guidance: M1 for 5 x 5^n or 5^(n+1) seen

parts.label: 6(e)
parts.guidance: B2 for 2x(2x + 5) - [1](2x + 5) [= 0] or 2x(2x - 1) + 5(2x - 1) [= 0] or for (2x + m)(2x + n) [= 0] with and mn = -5 or n + m = 4; B1 for both roots

parts.label: 6(f)(i)
parts.guidance: M1 for y = k(x + 3)^3 or better; M1 for 108 = their k(x + 3)^3

parts.label: 6(f)(ii)
parts.guidance: M1 for (1/2)^2 oe; or k/(1/4 d^2) oe seen or better

parts.label: 6(g)

parts.label: 6(h)

parts.label: 7(a)(ii)

parts.label: 7(b)(i)
parts.guidance: M2 for 29^2 + 21^2 + 20^2 oe or better; or M1 for 29^2 + 21^2 oe or 29^2 + 20^2 oe or 21^2 + 20^2 oe or better

parts.label: 7(b)(ii)
parts.guidance: M2 for sin[GAC] = 20/their AG oe; or M1 for angle GAC identified

parts.label: 7(c)

parts.guidance: B1 for each value

parts.label: 8(c)
parts.guidance: B1 for 32

parts.label: 9(a)
parts.answer: Correct sketch to go through (0, 0) and (360, 0)
parts.guidance: M1 for correct sine curve shape through the origin or for almost correct sketch fitting all tramlines but with an omission at either end or incorrect curvature in one place only

parts.label: 9(b)
parts.guidance: B2 for one correct angle; or M1 for sin x = -0.8 oe; If 0 scored SC1 for 2 reflex angles that add to 540 or two non-reflex angles that add to 180

parts.label: 10(b)
parts.guidance: M1 for 150/360 x pi x 15.6^2 oe

parts.label: 10(c)

parts.label: 11(b)(i)(b)
parts.guidance: B1 for 3/4 a
